# oversize_grandfather_txids.txt — empirical provenance for the consensus oversize grandfather table.
# COMPLETE scan of the canonical ZClassic chain, heights 0..3143532 (2026-06-11):
# every canonical transaction with serialized size > MAX_TX_SIZE_AFTER_SAPLING (102000).
# All 413 lie in heights 478544..1968856 (post-Sapling; Sapling activated 476969);
# zero pre-Sapling txs exceed 100000 (mine-time contextual rule held, verified not assumed).
# Method + artifacts: docs/CONSENSUS_PARITY_DOCTRINE.md 'Empirical oversize grandfather'.
# Format: <height> <txid display hex> <serialized size bytes>. Sorted by height.
# Regenerate the table: tools/scripts/gen_oversize_grandfather_table.sh (verifies every
# entry against a live zclassicd before emitting).
